case_title: GAGE, HENRY vs. LEE, ANGELA et al

docket_entries.description: SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 01

PRO TEM JUDGE:MORGAN PRICKETT/CLERK:ECLAVERIA/RPTR:DIANA PADILLA C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PLFF APPEARED THRU COUNSEL GUADALUPE GAMINO, AND DEFT PRESENT AND APPEARING PRO PER. CASE SETTLED AND TERMS ON RECORD, DEFT UNDERSTOOD TERMS & AGREE D THERETO. PLFF TO PREPARE THE STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, ANGELA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1885 GOLDEN GATE AVE #8, S.F., LEASE FORFEITED, ENTRY OF JUDGMENT WAS STAYED TILL 12/15/97. PLTF WAIVES RENT THRU 12/15/97. DECLARATION BY PLTF'S ATTY FILED.
